customer_anxiety_profile: Transactionally cooperative but not bought in. Herbert's core concern — what will this cost him monthly — was raised four times and never answered. He named the deflection pattern as a 'runaround' mid-call and expressed scam-adjacent suspicion. He agreed to the appointment functionally, not enthusiastically.
unresolved_concerns: Cost of installation and monthly payment amount — asked four times, never answered
What happens when solar underproduces (cloudy days, nighttime) — partially addressed via net metering explanation but Herbert pushed back and the concern was not fully resolved
Tree shading impact on system performance — Herbert raised this at 09:30 and it was not addressed
sensitive_topics_raised: Extreme weather event (two-and-a-half weeks of ice) driving the $700 bill spike — Herbert mentioned being housebound; this is a lived hardship, not just a data point
Existing solar panel on roof (hot water only) — orphaned_flow protocol was not executed; closer should confirm own vs. lease, original company, and system status before proceeding
exact_promises_rep_made: Design team will build options based on the kWh data Herbert read aloud
A specialist will bring the design to Herbert on Friday the 6th at 2:30 PM
A reminder call will be made midday Thursday to confirm the Friday time
Meg's direct number was texted to Herbert and she committed to being reachable there
closer_should_know: Herbert has an unresolved cost question he raised four times across the call — closer should be prepared to address it early. He is not hostile, but he will arrive at the appointment expecting a real number, not another process explanation.
